title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Safest rerun entrypoint is the **variant-matrix wrapper** with a **new delivery directory** (to avoid overwriting `delivery` / `delivery-recheck` and avoid lock collisions). It is the only path that keeps your existing source-locked inputs and runs nanobanana with built-in inspection/classification (`--profile nano-banana`, `content-only`). [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L501](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L501) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L581](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L581) ```bash node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js \ --input /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/content.json \ --workflow-decision /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/workflow-decision.json \ --deck-spec /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/deck-spec.json \ --asset-plan /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/asset-plan.json \ --delivery-dir /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-rerun-manus-keyrot ``` Nanobanana result will be here: `/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery-rerun-manus-keyrot/variants/nanobanana-manus/`
